name: Lemon Cherry Gelato
description_sm: Sweet and sour flavours with a tingly, relaxed, and happy effect.
description_md: Lemon Cherry Gelato offers a balanced high that starts with happiness and ends in full-body relaxation. Its fruity, citrus aroma is complemented by earthy and pine notes.
description_lg: Lemon Cherry Gelato is a sought-after hybrid known for its dense forest green buds with amber hairs and milky trichomes. The high begins with uplifting happiness, swiftly erasing negative moods and transitioning into soothing relaxation. Aromas of lime, berries, and citrus blend with woody and sour undertones, while flavours balance between tart lemons and sweet fruits. Ideal for easing anxiety, chronic pain, and stress, this strain is perfect for relaxed evenings and unwinding after a long day.

name: Blue Dream
description_sm: Sweet blueberry flavours with a creative, euphoric, and happy effect.
description_md: Blue Dream delivers an energising cerebral high with soothing full-body relaxation. Its sweet blueberry aroma and taste provide a comforting backdrop to this legendary strain.
description_lg: Blue Dream is a celebrated hybrid recognised for its bright neon green popcorn-shaped buds dusted with milky trichomes. The experience begins with an uplifting, motivating cerebral high that inspires creativity and focus, followed by a mellow body relaxation that alleviates pain and tension. Flavours of sugary blueberries and aromas reminiscent of blueberry pie linger long after use. Favoured for easing stress, depression, and chronic pain, Blue Dream has earned legendary status across the West Coast.

name: Wedding Cake
description_sm: Sweet, creamy flavours with relaxing, happy, and uplifting effects.
description_md: Wedding Cake offers a relaxing and euphoric experience with rich, tangy flavours accented by earthy pepper. Its frosty buds promise a sweet, creamy taste that calms body and mind.
description_lg: Also known as Pink Cookies, Wedding Cake is renowned for its dense, pine tree-shaped buds covered in orange hairs and frosty crystals. The high unfolds with a calming, euphoric wave that relaxes body and mind, followed by a gentle sedative effect ideal for promoting sleep. Flavour notes combine the sweetness of cookies with fruity and vanilla undertones, complemented by spicy black pepper aromas. Loved for easing pain, insomnia, and appetite loss, Wedding Cake was awarded Leafly Strain of the Year in 2019, embodying potency and rich flavour.

name: Permanent Marker
description_sm: Sweet, sour and citrus flavours blend with relaxing, creative and euphoric effects.
description_md: Permanent Marker delights with pungent floral and candy aromas, delivering a creative yet calming high suited to daytime or evening relaxation.
description_lg: Permanent Marker is a celebrated strain known for its potent, lingering floral and soapy funk aromas with hints of candy and gas. Its dense, emerald-green buds boast vibrant orange hairs and crystalline trichomes. The high supports creativity and relaxation alike, starting with a tingly, euphoric buzz that eases into soothing calm—ideal for managing stress, fatigue, or mood swings.

name: GG4
description_sm: Pine and diesel flavours complement a heavy, relaxing and euphoric body high.
description_md: Original Glue offers a soothing euphoric high, melting away tension and guiding you into deep relaxation with rich chocolate and earthy diesel notes.
description_lg: GG4, also called Original Glue, is famed for its sticky, resinous buds and powerful, sedative high that gradually glues users to their seats. With pungent diesel and chocolate aromas and dense olive-green nugs adorned with amber hairs, the strain delivers a blissful combination of mental euphoria and profound physical calm, making it a trusted choice for relief from pain, insomnia and stress.

name: Super Boof
description_sm: Berry and cherry flavours shine with uplifting, focused, and giggly effects.
description_md: Super Boof offers a unique balance of mental focus and relaxing euphoria, peppered with sweet cherry and citrus aromas for a distinctive sensory experience.
description_lg: Super Boof is a celebrated hybrid strain famed for its dense, deep green and purple buds with silvery calyxes and sweet, fruity flavours that include cherry and citrus. Its effects begin with uplifting, creative focus, often leading to giggles and relaxation making it suitable for managing stress, pain, and mood disorders. Known for award-winning flower and hash, this strain is as versatile as it is potent.

name: Granddaddy Purple
description_sm: Famous for its sweet berry flavours and deeply relaxing effects.
description_md: Granddaddy Purple is renowned for its potent fusion of cerebral euphoria and physical relaxation, highlighted by its sweet grape and berry aromas.
description_lg: Granddaddy Purple, a celebrated hybrid, delivers a dreamy cerebral buzz paired with profound body relaxation. Its striking deep purple buds dusted with white crystal resin complement its sweet grape and berry aromas. Often sought for easing pain, stress, and insomnia, this strain offers a timeless experience with a complex aroma and a chill, fixed sensation that lasts throughout the high.

name: Ice Cream Cake
description_sm: Creamy and sweet with a deeply relaxing, sedating body high.
description_md: Ice Cream Cake offers a luscious flavour of creamy vanilla and sugary dough, alongside calming effects that lull the mind and body into full relaxation.
description_lg: Ice Cream Cake stands out with its luscious creaminess and sweet vanilla notes unfolding through dense grape-shaped buds coated in frosty trichomes. The high unfolds with a euphoric cerebral lift followed by a soothing body relaxation, making it ideal for evening use when unwinding and drifting to sleep is the goal. Its calming effect has earned it a reputation among those seeking relief from pain, anxiety, and insomnia.

name: Sour Diesel
description_sm: Known for its pungent diesel aroma and energising, uplifting effects.
description_md: Sour Diesel delivers a fast-acting, dreamy cerebral high with pungent diesel notes and hints of citrus, perfect for boosting creativity and energy.
description_lg: Sour Diesel is celebrated for its invigorating cerebral buzz that energises the mind without causing heaviness. Its distinctively pungent diesel aroma is tinged with hints of lemon and sweet citrus, complementing dense light green buds flecked with orange hairs. Favoured since the early 1990s, this strain is a go-to for those seeking relief from depression, fatigue, and stress while enhancing creativity and sociability throughout the day.

name: Runtz
description_sm: Fruity sweetness blends with calming, uplifting effects for a smooth experience.
description_md: Runtz offers a creamy, smooth smoke with fruity and tropical flavours while delivering long-lasting euphoric and uplifting effects suited for relaxation and sleep.
description_lg: Runtz stands out with its creamy, smooth smoke and a complex fruity flavour akin to sugary candy. Known for euphoric highs that start with a calming lift and spread into full-body relaxation, it suits those seeking lasting uplift and sedation. Dense grape-shaped buds show olive green hues with purple undertones and frosty crystals.

name: Gelato
description_sm: Sweet sherbet flavours with fruity and creamy notes pair with uplifting effects.
description_md: Gelato delivers a heady cerebral rush with fruity sherbet flavours and subtle woody aromas, uplifting mind and body with calming, relaxing sensations.
description_lg: Gelato captivates with its luscious sherbet sweetness mingling berry, citrus, and creamy vanilla flavours. The high starts with a euphoric cerebral rush, enhancing focus and creativity, before settling into a calm, relaxed body buzz. Its dense, colourful buds flaunt vivid greens and purples adorned with sticky resin, ideal for social or reflective moments.

name: Cereal Milk
description_sm: Sweet, creamy berry flavours blend with calming, energising and sociable effects.
description_md: Cereal Milk offers a sweet creamy taste with hints of berries and sugary milk, accompanied by a balanced high that lifts your mood while keeping focus and calmness.
description_lg: Cereal Milk delights with its sweet, creamy flavour reminiscent of sugary leftover milk from a bowl of cereal. Its aromatic profile includes fruity and herbal notes that complement a euphoric and uplifting high. The experience combines calm focus with creative energy and sociability, making it ideal for relaxed, productive days. Buds are dense with frosty crystals and vibrant hues.

name: White Widow
description_sm: Euphoric and creative, White Widow offers piney, spicy sweetness with uplifting effects.
description_md: White Widow dazzles with white crystal buds, delivering an exhilarating euphoric rush and creative energy, enhanced by its woody and spicy nuances.
description_lg: White Widow, famous worldwide since the 1990s, captivates with chunky white crystal-covered buds signalling potent effects. It unleashes a powerful burst of euphoria and energy that sparks creativity and uplifting conversation. Known for its woody, spicy, and earthy flavours and suitable for outdoor activities, it offers a balanced high that helps alleviate stress, anxiety, and pain while keeping users mentally aware.

name: GSC
description_sm: GSC delights with sweet, minty cherry flavours and a balanced, relaxing euphoria.
description_md: GSC, renowned for its cookie-like sweet, earthy and minty aroma, offers a balanced cerebral uplift paired with full-body relaxation and a comforting hunger.
description_lg: GSC, also known as Girl Scout Cookies, boasts luscious dark olive green buds with bright orange hairs and a thick resin coating. Its euphoric cerebral high uplifts mood and banishes negativity, followed by a deeply relaxing body effect that can couch-lock users. The flavour profile blends sweet cherries, lemon, and mint with earthy nuttiness, ideal for relieving anxiety, stress, and chronic pain while inspiring creativity and calm.

name: OG Kush
description_sm: OG Kush offers a citrusy, pine taste with relaxing and sociable effects.
description_md: OG Kush combines citrus, pine, and skunky aromas with a harmonious high that lifts the mind, sparks sociability, and eases tension, finishing with a pleasant munchies wave.
description_lg: OG Kush, a cornerstone of West Coast cannabis culture since the 1990s, features fat grape-shaped forest green buds with vibrant orange hairs and a generous coating of crystal trichomes. Its complex aroma marries lemon-pine-fuel scents with dank and spicy undertones. The experience brings an uplifted, happy, and sociable mood that evolves into giggles and relaxation, making it perfect for unwinding later in the day and alleviating stress, anxiety, and migraines.

name: Northern Lights
description_sm: Sweet, spicy flavours with a relaxing, euphoric body high and soothing effects.
description_md: Northern Lights brings a firm body relaxation that eases the mind, perfect for unwinding after a long day. Its sweet and spicy aroma complements its calming effects.
description_lg: Northern Lights is a legendary strain celebrated for its resinous buds and fast flowering. It delivers euphoric effects that deeply relax muscles and quiet the mind, making it ideal for stress relief and insomnia. Noted for its pungent, sweet and spicy aroma with pine and woody undertones, this strain carries a rich history and a reputation for resilience in growth. Its purple crystal-coated buds enhance its top-shelf appeal, treasured worldwide.

name: Pineapple Express
description_sm: Bright citrus and pineapple flavours with energetic, happy, and focused effects.
description_md: Pineapple Express offers long-lasting, energising effects that inspire creativity and alertness. Its taste combines bright citrus and tropical pineapple with a sweet pine aroma.
description_lg: Pineapple Express is renowned for its uplifting and energetic qualities, making it ideal for daytime enjoyment. Its vibrant citrus and pineapple flavours mingle with sweet pine undertones to create an extraordinary palate experience. This strain inspires alertness, creativity, and happiness, while also providing relief from depression, fatigue, and pain. Favoured by many, it conjures a calming yet stimulating effect that heightens focus and awareness.

name: Biscotti
description_sm: Sweet, nutty flavours with relaxing, euphoric, and uplifting body effects.
description_md: Biscotti delivers a cerebral high that gently builds into a relaxing body buzz, accompanied by sweet cookie flavours with hints of spice and diesel.
description_lg: Biscotti is a potent hybrid known for its striking trichome coverage and top-shelf appeal. It offers a unique experience with a cerebral, uplifted state leading into a relaxing, stoney body high. The aroma combines earthy herbs, fruity notes and a distinct cookie scent, while the taste is dominated by sugary sweetness and subtle spice. Ideal for those seeking relief from stress, anxiety and depression, Biscotti also encourages creativity and giggles with every use.

name: GMO Cookies
description_sm: Garlic-flavoured, euphoric and deeply relaxing with a potent body high.
description_md: GMO Cookies delivers a euphoric and uplifting high, paired with a distinct garlic and diesel aroma. Its relaxing body effects make it ideal for unwinding.
description_lg: GMO Cookies offers a powerful experience marked by a euphoric cerebral lift followed by a deeply relaxing body buzz. This strain features pungent garlic and diesel aromas alongside nutty, spicy notes. Its dense, olive-green buds are decorated with bright orange hairs and crystal trichomes. Favoured for easing chronic pain, stress, and insomnia, it may also induce sleepiness and couch-lock in higher doses.

name: Jack Herer
description_sm: Energising and creative with fresh citrus and pine notes.
description_md: Jack Herer offers an energising, clear-headed euphoria accented by pine and citrus. Perfect for uplifting the mood and promoting creativity throughout the day.
description_lg: Jack Herer is a celebrated strain known for its lively and uplifting effects that foster creativity, focus, and sociability. Its complex aroma blends citrus, pine, and herbal scents, with bright neon green nugs speckled with vivid orange hairs. Originally bred in the Netherlands and inspired by a famed activist, it has earned numerous awards. This strain is ideal for combating fatigue, stress, and mood disorders with a sharp, motivating high.

name: Sherbert
description_sm: Sweet and creamy with fruity, minty flavours and relaxing effects.
description_md: Sherbert delivers a unique balance of euphoric energy and full-bodied relaxation, enhanced by sweet, fruity, and minty flavours with nutty undertones.
description_lg: Sherbert captivates with its sweet, creamy character reminiscent of sherbet ice cream, intertwined with fruity and minty notes. This strain offers an uplifting cerebral energy that blossoms into a calming body buzz, inducing happiness and a relaxed yet clear-headed state. The dense mint green buds adorned with fiery orange hairs and glistening trichomes reflect its quality. Ideal for easing stress, pain, and mood disorders, it gently boosts mood without causing sedation.

name: Gumbo
description_sm: Sweet bubble gum flavours meet relaxing, sleepy effects and a creative buzz.
description_md: Gumbo delivers a relaxing and sleepy experience with a smooth pine aroma and notable bubble gum flavour. Expect a creative and euphoric uplift alongside hunger and happiness.
description_lg: Named for its distinctive bubblegum flavour, Gumbo offers a deeply relaxing and sleepy effect that encourages a calm indoor experience. Colourful nugs with hues of purple, blue, and dark green are covered in trichomes, and the piney aroma finishes smoothly. The high is intense and perfect for easing aches or stress, with a reputation for boosting appetite. It’s ideal for those seeking restful relaxation or relief with a touch of creative euphoria.

name: Gary Payton
description_sm: Berry and cherry flavours with a balanced euphoric and uplifting high.
description_md: Gary Payton offers an immediate uplifting cerebral boost paired with a relaxing body high, complemented by sweet, nutty, and spicy flavours alongside earthy diesel aromas.
description_lg: This highly sought-after hybrid is a blend of classic celebrity strains, resulting in fluffy emerald-green buds with thin orange hairs and sticky trichomes. The rich aroma fuses fruity cherries, diesel, and spice, while the high instantly energises the mind with clear focus and happiness. A mellow body relaxation follows, perfect for managing stress, pain, or mood fluctuations without dulling mental clarity.

name: Apple Fritter
description_sm: Sweet apple and vanilla flavours with a euphoric, happy, and relaxing effect.
description_md: Apple Fritter delivers a rush of uplifting energy with soothing body relaxation, all wrapped in sweet fruity apple and vanilla aromas that evoke a fresh-baked pastry.
description_lg: Known for its powerful yet relaxing high, Apple Fritter combines the rich flavours of sweet apple, earthy undertones, and a hint of vanilla. It produces a cerebral lift that washes away negative thoughts, along with a tingly, calming body sensation. The dense spade-shaped nugs boast deep purple hues and vivid orange hairs, coating the senses with an aroma reminiscent of an apple pastry. This strain is ideal for calming chronic pain, depression, and insomnia while uplifting the spirit.

name: Pink Runtz
description_sm: Sweet, fruity flavour with uplifting, giggly, and relaxing effects.
description_md: Pink Runtz delights with a sweet and fruity aroma, creating long-lasting uplifting and relaxing effects that leave you happy and slightly tingly.
description_lg: Pink Runtz is a distinctive hybrid renowned for its dense buds with dark green and purple hues. It offers a sweet, cherry-berry flavour with a sour candy undertone, paired with euphoric and uplifting effects that ease stress and inspire happiness. This strain is perfect for those seeking a joyful, relaxed experience that lasts, characterised by a unique dense bud structure and a captivating scent.

name: Durban Poison
description_sm: Earthy with sweet pine notes, producing energetic, creative effects.
description_md: Durban Poison features an earthy, sweet aroma with subtle pine, delivering an energetic head high that fuels creativity and focus for productive days.
description_lg: Originating from South Africa, Durban Poison is celebrated for its robust, round buds coated in thick trichomes. Its sweet and earthy aroma with hints of pine sets the stage for an uplifting, energising experience ideal for creativity and active pursuits. Known for encouraging focus and happiness, this strain has a rich history and is favoured both recreationally and medicinally.

name: Oreoz
description_sm: Rich campfire aroma with relaxing and tingly effects.
description_md: Oreoz is a potent hybrid distinguished by its campfire s'mores aroma, blending chocolate and diesel hints for a deeply relaxing and long-lasting high.
description_lg: Oreoz, sometimes called Oreo Cookies, is a powerful hybrid known for producing a soothing and enduring high. Its aroma evokes campfire s'mores with delightful chocolate and diesel notes, creating a sensory experience reminiscent of rich, toasty flavours. Its relaxing and tingly effects make it suitable for those seeking relief from stress, insomnia, or appetite loss, appealing especially to medicinal users.

name: RS11
description_sm: A fruity, sweet strain offering a calm, focused, and relaxing experience.
description_md: RS11 delivers a smooth smoke with a sweet, spicy aroma and fruity flavours, providing a calming yet alert high conducive to relaxation and creativity.
description_lg: RS11, known as Rainbow Sherbert #11, captivates with its dense grape-shaped buds and a rich, fruity flavour profile tinged with sour citrus and spicy sweetness. Its smooth smoke brings a potent, calming effect that relaxes the body while keeping the mind alert and creative, making it ideal for unwinding with a lingering pleasant aroma.

name: Mac 1
description_sm: A smooth, creamy strain with sweet, sour, and herbal flavours and uplifting effects.
description_md: Mac 1 offers an energising cerebral high matched by a deep relaxing body sensation. Its creamy, funky flavour, accented by sour diesel and sweet citrus, complements its striking, milky trichome-covered buds.
description_lg: Mac 1 is a visually stunning strain with fluffy dark olive green nugs adorned with rich purple undertones and milky white trichomes. Its flavour combines smooth creaminess with funky, spicy herbal notes balanced by sweet citrus. The high begins with euphoric mental clarity that lifts mood and sparks creativity, while a calming body effect keeps you grounded in a perfectly balanced experience.

name: Purple Punch
description_sm: A sweet, dessert strain with flavours of blueberry, grape, and vanilla, promoting relaxation.
description_md: Purple Punch offers a smooth experience with a sweet, fruity flavour profile, combining blueberry and grape undertones that lead to a deeply relaxing and euphoric effect, perfect for evening use.
description_lg: Purple Punch features fluffy bright green buds speckled with red-orange hairs and frosted in tiny amber crystals. This dessert strain delights with sweet, vanilla-infused blueberry and grape flavours, complemented by earthy and herbal aromas. The high delivers a euphoric uplift that gently sedates the body, making it ideal for managing stress, insomnia, and minor aches.

name: The Original Z
description_sm: A calm, focused strain with sweet, tropical notes and relaxing body effects.
description_md: The Original Z offers a calming and happy experience, blending sweet tropical flavours with a relaxed focus. Its medium-sized green colas make it a distinct choice for unwinding any time.
description_lg: The Original Z is a celebrated hybrid that delivers a calming effect, leaving consumers focused, alert and happy while relaxing the body. Originating from a mix of Grape Ape and Grapefruit, with a sweet and tropical flavour profile, it won several awards including the 2016 Emerald Cup. Its medium-sized, spongy green colas offer a unique presentation, making it a versatile strain to unwind with throughout the day.

name: Dosidos
description_sm: Sweet minty lime flavour with relaxing and euphoric body effects.
description_md: Dosidos delights with a sweet, minty cookie flavour and sweet lime aroma. It offers a powerful initial cerebral rush followed by deep, sedating relaxation ideal for experienced users.
description_lg: Dosidos is a potent hybrid boasting glittering trichomes and vibrant purple leaves. Its sweet, minty cookie flavour accompanied by fresh lime and pine aromas offers a feast for the senses. The effect begins with a euphoric cerebral rush, softening into a pervasive body relaxation that leaves one sedated and couch-locked. Perfect for those seeking relief from insomnia, chronic pain, nausea, or depression, Dosidos is a remarkably powerful and visually striking strain.

name: Jealousy
description_sm: Sweet berry with creamy candy notes and happy, uplifting effects.
description_md: Jealousy offers a balancing effect with mental relaxation and physical energy. Its berry, cherry, and citrus flavours blend with creamy undertones, perfect for mild stress relief.
description_lg: Jealousy is an award-winning hybrid known for producing a harmonious balance of mental calm and physical energy. This strain treats mild stress with effects that uplift mood, inspire creativity, and encourage motivation while ensuring relaxation. Its flavour is a delightful mix of sweet berry, creamy candy, cherry, and fruity notes, complemented by aromas of citrus, earthiness, and vanilla. With visually appealing olive green nugs accented by purple hues and a coating of crystal trichomes, Jealousy is both a sensory and therapeutic pleasure.
